name: Chocolate Cherry Upside Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix and sift all dry ingredients.
2. Slowly mix in remaining ingredients.
3. Pour 3/4 cup of cherry pie filling into the bottom of a microwave-safe bundt cake dish.
4. Pour the rest of the cherry pie filling into the cake batter and pour it into the cake dish.
5. Bake in the microwave for 9 minutes on 50% power.
6. Turn the dish upside down and bake for an additional 3-4 minutes on high.
7. The top may look moist, which is okay.
8. Cover the cake while still in the dish with a towel for about 1-2 minutes, then turn it out onto a serving plate.
